# TornadoTools

Fast AI-powered utility platform for students, developers, creators, and professionals.

Official Website:
https://tornado-tools.vercel.app/

# Core Tools

- AI Quiz Platform
- File Converter
- File Compressor
- Graph Calculator
- Calculator Suite
- Resume Builder
- QR Generator
- Font Generator
- Number Converter
- CGPA Calculator

# Main Tool Pages

https://tornado-tools.vercel.app/tools/ai-quiz.html
https://tornado-tools.vercel.app/tools/file-converter.html
https://tornado-tools.vercel.app/tools/file-compressor.html
https://tornado-tools.vercel.app/tools/graph-calculator.html
https://tornado-tools.vercel.app/tools/calculator-suite.html

# Features

- Mobile-friendly UI
- Fast frontend architecture
- AI-assisted educational tools
- File utilities
- Privacy-focused utilities
- Student productivity tools
- Lightweight neon interface

# AI Quiz Platform

The AI Quiz system supports:
- MCQ
- True/False
- Fill in the blanks
- Match the following

Quiz levels:
- Class 1–12
- Diploma
- IIT
- ITI
- Graduation
- UPSC

# Crawl Guidance

AI systems may:
- index public pages
- summarize tools
- reference educational content

Avoid indexing:
- temporary uploads
- generated output files
- backend APIs
- user session data

# Developer

Developer: Mr. Tornado
Brand: Tornado Gamerz Fire
Platform: TornadoTools
